title: Showing what still needs deciding
question: How should decisions that haven't been made yet show up in the viewer?

history.from: The pinned group was labeled 'Needs deciding'
history.reason: Renamed the pinned group to 'Open' so it matches the 'Open' filter chip and the decision's open/decided language — one word for the same idea everywhere

rationale: Open decisions surface two ways: an 'Open' group pinned above the list and an 'Open' filter chip by search; both vanish when nothing is open. A review-first tool shouldn't make you hunt for what's still undecided.

tradeoffs.note: what's unresolved is always in view, and one click isolates it
both surfaces hide when nothing is open
two small surfaces instead of one
isolates open decisions, but hides them behind a click
no way to focus on just open ones once the list grows
open status only visible after opening that one decision
